name: Fighter Escape
description: The Survivor is shooting game and you are one from few survivors after apocalypse. So you need to shoot the zombies and other creatures who want to destroy you. They will came in waves, so between every level it is better to buy and upgrade your weapon and ammo. Destroy your enemies and enjoy in this game.
